# Hlido — Full Review Corpus

This file is the answer-engine corpus for Hlido, the trust layer for AI agents. Every reviewed agent appears with public verdict, score, tier, and summary. Scoring methodology weights are intentionally private; only published outcomes are here.

> Base URL: https://hlido.eu
> MCP endpoint: https://hlido.eu/mcp (JSON-RPC 2.0, 5 tools, no auth)
> Corpus size: 8 reviews

## Reviewed agents

### jared-so
- Slug: `jared-so`
- Laddoo Score: 40/100
- Tier: undefined
- Category: Productivity
- Reviewed: 2026-05-01
- URL: https://hlido.eu/reviews/jared-so/
- MCP query: `{"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"trust_check","arguments":{"agent_or_url":"jared-so"}}}`

**Summary:** Public-surface review of jared-so.

**Evidence:** Captured from public surfaces and verified claim-by-claim. C2PA pending.

### Gumloop
- Slug: `gumloop`
- Laddoo Score: 80/100
- Tier: undefined
- Category: AI Workflow Builder
- Reviewed: 2026-04-26
- URL: https://hlido.eu/reviews/gumloop/
- MCP query: `{"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"trust_check","arguments":{"agent_or_url":"gumloop"}}}`

**Summary:** Gumloop is a no-code AI workflow builder with a Free tier (5k credits/month), tiered Pro plan starting at $37/mo, and integrations spanning Slack, Google, and more. Public surfaces audited 2026-04-26.

**Evidence:** Captured from public surfaces and verified claim-by-claim. C2PA signed.

---

### Aider
- Slug: `aider`
- Laddoo Score: 90/100
- Tier: undefined
- Category: AI Coding CLI
- Reviewed: 2026-04-26
- URL: https://hlido.eu/reviews/aider/
- MCP query: `{"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"trust_check","arguments":{"agent_or_url":"aider"}}}`

**Summary:** Aider 0.86.2 — open-source AI pair-programming CLI. Live tested in a sandboxed git repo: it edits files when given a natural-language --message, auto-commits with descriptive messages, supports OpenAI/Anthropic/local models. MIT licensed.

**Evidence:** Live CLI test. We installed via pip, ran a real edit task in a temp git repo, and verified the resulting file + commit.

---
